query: Using the provided scoreboard frame from the end of the 3rd quarter, identify the exact visible score for BRISTOL CENT. and E. CATHOLIC, determine who is leading, and state which answer option matches. Ignore earlier-quarter frames and rely on the end-of-third-quarter display.
text_contexts: Options include 55-40 Bristol Central leading, 52-52 tied, 55-40 East Catholic leading, 64-32 Bristol Central leading, and 64-32 East Catholic leading.
Question asks: What is the score at the end of the third quarter?
